  1. io.bloviate.ext

Uses of Package
io.bloviate.ext

Packages that use io.bloviate.ext
Package
Description
io.bloviate.datafaker
 
io.bloviate.db
 
io.bloviate.ext
 
io.bloviate.testcontainers
 
  • Classes in io.bloviate.ext used by io.bloviate.datafaker
    Class
    Description
    GeneratorPlugin
    Service-provider interface that lets a jar contribute custom generator rules to a GeneratorRegistry without subclassing DatabaseSupport.
    GeneratorRegistry.Builder
    Builds an immutable GeneratorRegistry.
  • Classes in io.bloviate.ext used by io.bloviate.db
    Class
    Description
    DatabaseSupport
    Database-specific support interface for data generation and SQL handling.
    GeneratorRegistry
    A user-facing registry of custom GeneratorFactory rules that lets callers override data generation without subclassing DatabaseSupport.
  • Classes in io.bloviate.ext used by io.bloviate.ext
    Class
    Description
    AbstractDatabaseSupport
    Base DatabaseSupport that maps columns to generators through a JDBCType-keyed registry of GeneratorFactory entries.
    DatabaseSupport
    Database-specific support interface for data generation and SQL handling.
    GeneratorFactory
    Builds the DataGenerator used for a column of a particular JDBC type.
    GeneratorPlugin
    Service-provider interface that lets a jar contribute custom generator rules to a GeneratorRegistry without subclassing DatabaseSupport.
    GeneratorRegistry
    A user-facing registry of custom GeneratorFactory rules that lets callers override data generation without subclassing DatabaseSupport.
    GeneratorRegistry.Builder
    Builds an immutable GeneratorRegistry.
    PostgresSupport
    PostgreSQL-specific DatabaseSupport.
  • Classes in io.bloviate.ext used by io.bloviate.testcontainers
    Class
    Description
    DatabaseSupport
    Database-specific support interface for data generation and SQL handling.
